title: Set up CSS variables and Theme Engine
description: Define CSS variables for both light and dark modes in index.css. Implement basic theme loading logic in App.jsx.
verification_method: Check if data-theme='light' attribute changes colors on the body.
acceptance_criteria: CSS variables defined for background, text, and surfaces
Initial theme load from localStorage in App.jsx

title: Implement Top Tab Navigation
description: Create TabNavigation component and manage activeTab state in App.jsx.
acceptance_criteria: Tabs for Dashboard, Month, Week, Events visible in Header
Active tab state managed in App.jsx
Switching tabs re-renders the main content area

title: Update SettingsModal with Theme Toggle
description: Add theme switching UI to SettingsModal and ensure it updates the global theme state.
verification_method: Toggle theme in settings and see colors change instantly.

title: Add File Dropzone and External URL
description: Enhance SettingsModal with a file dropzone for uploads and a text field for external URLs.
verification_method: Upload a file via drag-drop and verify it loads events.

title: Create DashboardView with basic stat cards
description: Implement DashboardView component with total events count, category breakdown, and 'Next Event' highlight.
verification_method: View dashboard tab and see stats.
acceptance_criteria: Pie or Bar chart for Category distribution

title: Implement 'Next Event' countdown logic
description: Calculate the nearest upcoming event and display a live countdown on the Dashboard.
verification_method: Check if the Dashboard shows a countdown to the next event.
acceptance_criteria: Dynamic update when calendar data changes

title: Implement WeekView with horizontal timeline
description: Create a WeekView component that displays the current week's events in a horizontal timeline or list format.
verification_method: View week tab and see a clear timeline of the current week.

title: Implement EventListView (Nearest Events)
description: Create EventListView component to display a sorted list of all upcoming events.
verification_method: View events tab and see a list of upcoming events.
acceptance_criteria: Sorted list of events by date

title: Final UI polish and responsive check
description: Review all views for visual consistency, fix any remaining CSS issues, and ensure smooth transitions.
verification_method: Manually test all views and resizing.

title: Create storage for special days and tags
description: Initialize special_days.json and tags_config.json in the backend directory.
verification_method: Check if files exist and have valid JSON structure.
acceptance_criteria: tags_config.json initialized with default primary and 'where' tags
Files are in a persistent directory

title: Implement API endpoints for Special Days and Tags
description: Add CRUD endpoints for special days and tags in main.py.
verification_method: Use curl or browser to test GET/POST /api/special-days and /api/tags.
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/special-days/assign bulk assigns tags to dates

title: Merge Special Days into Calendar API
description: Update /api/calendar to include special days in each day object.
verification_method: Verify /api/calendar response contains 'special_days' field for tagged dates.
acceptance_criteria: Each day in /api/calendar response can contain special_days metadata
Special days are correctly indexed by date

title: Implement SpecialDaysView with 12-month grid
description: Create a new view for the 'Special Days' tab showing the full year.
verification_method: Manually check if the 12-month grid renders correctly.

title: Implement Day Selection and Action Panel
description: Add multi-select logic and panels for tag management and assignment.
verification_method: Select multiple days and verify they are highlighted.
acceptance_criteria: Batch-assign tags to all selected days via a sidebar or floating panel

title: Integrate Special Days tab and Main View highlights
description: Add the tab to Header and update MonthGrid to show special day indicators.
verification_method: Check if special days show up in the 4-month view with correct colors.
acceptance_criteria: MonthGrid displays indicators (dots or background) for special days
